title: Employee Onboarding Checklist and First-Week Steps
text:
Q: What should I do during my onboarding process and first week at the company?
A: During your onboarding process, you should complete the following checklist within your first week: 1) Review and sign your employment contract and any necessary tax forms by your first day. 2) Set up your company email and access to essential software tools by the end of your first day. 3) Attend the orientation session scheduled for your second day, where you will learn about company policies and culture. 4) Meet with your assigned mentor or buddy within the first three days to discuss your role and expectations. 5) Complete any required training modules by the end of your first week. 6) Schedule a one-on-one meeting with your manager by the end of the week to discuss your progress and any questions you may have. For assistance, please reach out to the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234.
